commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `session_status({ sessionKey: "current" })` resolution so WebChat semantic-current lookups prefer the full effective requester key, with regressions for persisted and unpersisted `agent:admin:main` sessions.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +56. Total +71 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current `main` can leave WebChat `sessionKey: "current"` unresolved when no `runSessionKey` exists, then fall through to alias/main lookup instead of the effective requester. I did not run tests because this review is read-only and local tests may write artifacts.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor-provided real WebChat behavior proof before merge; automation cannot supply proof from the contributor's environment.

target.title: fix(agents): resolve webchat current session status
target.body:
## Summary

- Resolve semantic `session_status({ sessionKey: "current" })` against the full effective requester key before alias fallback.
- Use the full requester key when synthesizing an unpersisted semantic-current fallback without `runSessionKey`.
- Add WebChat regressions for both persisted and unpersisted `agent:admin:main` current-session lookups.

Fixes #89773

## Validation

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/openclaw-tools.session-status.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/sessions-resolution.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `npx oxfmt --check src/agents/openclaw-tools.session-status.test.ts src/agents/tools/session-status-tool.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/openclaw-tools.session-status.test.ts src/agents/tools/session-status-tool.ts`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: sweetcornna
